description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, use the Landsat multispectral GeoTIFF at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (Band 1=SWIR1, Band 2=NIR, Band 3=Red, Band 4=Green) to compute Suspended Particulate Matter (SPM) using an empirical bio-optical model. Derive three new bands: 'NDTI' (Normalized Difference Turbidity Index) using the formula (band_3 - band_4) / (band_3 + band_4); 'SPM_mg_L' using the regional exponential model 25.5 * exp(3.1 * NDTI); and 'exceedance_mask' to flag pixels where SPM_mg_L exceeds 75.0 mg/L. Save the enriched product containing all bands in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/water_quality_model. Export the 'SPM_mg_L' band as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/spm_concentration.tif and the 'exceedance_mask' band as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/exceedance_mask.tif.
